scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --success first -n web,api -c blue,green "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter api dev"
scripts.build: pnpm deps-guard && pnpm ui-api-guard && pnpm architecture && pnpm -r build
scripts.architecture: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs packages/domain/src packages/contracts/src apps/api/src && node scripts/architecture-negative-test.mjs
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
